name: Jed
author: J. Mark Thompson & Kerry Handscomb (2021; Jade: Thompson c. 2001) / AGP port
description: A revisioning of Hex with shared pieces, unequal objectives and unequal board spaces (Abstract Games #22). Both players place Black OR White stones on a 9x11 hex parallelogram whose cells are typed J/E/D; placements must cycle J-E-D. Cross wins when one like-coloured group touches all four sides; Parallel wins when a Black and a White group span the same pair of opposite sides — whoever's objective is completed wins, no matter who placed the stone. Modified pie rule: move 1 declares a role, which the second player may adopt. Draws are impossible.
